subject: A large armored spider creature in a web-filled green-toned environment, with egg sacs or cocoons visible around it
description: A massive spider occupies the center of the image, its body heavily plated and armored-looking, with multiple articulated legs spread wide. The creature's body has a rounded, dome-like quality. Around it, small spherical objects — egg sacs or prey wrapped in webbing — are visible floating or attached nearby. The entire image is rendered in muted green and grey tones with white silk-like web filaments crossing the frame. The creature appears to be at rest or in the act of tending to its surroundings.
foreground: large armored spider, plated carapace, multiple legs spread
background: web filaments, green-tinged void, egg sac clusters
emotion: ancient, patient menace — the spider is unhurried in its domain
